primary_text: This is the one you've been waiting for. Xero Shoes EOFY Sale is ON. 25% off sitewide. Up to 40% off selected styles. Your feet deserve better and right now, they can get it for less. Sale ends June 30. Don't sit on this one.
headline: Your feet called. EOFY Sale is here.
adset_hint: OPEN > EOFY SALE > Batch One > 19th June

concept: Local Sydney Ads for New Store
primary_text: Your feet weren't designed to be squeezed into narrow shoes all day. Experience the comfort of a wide toe box, zero-drop design, and natural movement footwear at the new Xero Shoes Alexandria store. Come in, try a pair on, and feel the difference for yourself.
headline: Now Open in Alexandria
